mapper.select:
SELECT id, welink_id, w3_account, chinese_name, english_name, department, status, create_time, last_update_time FROM openplatform_employee_t WHERE status = 1 AND welink_id IN
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT id, welink_id, w3_account, chinese_name, english_name, department, status, create_time, last_update_time FROM openplatform_employee_t WHERE status = 1 AND welink_id = #{welinkId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT id, welink_id, w3_account, chinese_name, english_name, department, status, create_time, last_update_time FROM openplatform_employee_t WHERE status = 1 AND (w3_account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR chinese_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR english_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR welink_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')) ORDER BY chinese_name ASC
